examples: Spring ploughing is in full swing.
They ought to finish ploughing the south field by tomorrow.
American taxpayers are ploughing billions in. Will they get their money back?
For millennia man has been changing the landscape, hacking and burning forests and ploughing up grasslands.
Plaid Cymru AM, Llyr Huws Griffiths, accused health managers of "ploughing on regardless" with the proposals.
